title: mentha pulegium subsp. cephalonia
intro: Mentha pulegium subsp. cephalonia, also known as the Cephalonian pennyroyal, is a subspecies of the pennyroyal plant (Mentha pulegium) native to Greece. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural digestive aid, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Cephalonian pennyroyal include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Cephalonian pennyroyal can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or tincture, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support various health conditions.
